summary: Tested P0 fixes: (1) Backend shutdown crash fix - verified no NameError on server restart, mongo_client properly imported from database.py. (2) Resend test email endpoint - POST /api/admin/service-api-keys/resend/test works correctly, detects production vs test key. (3) Frontend Test Email Configuration section visible and functional in Admin Settings > API Keys tab.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 fixes verified: (1) Backend shutdown no longer crashes with NameError - mongo_client is properly imported from database.py at line 118 of server.py and used in shutdown handler at line 17554. (2) Resend test email endpoint at POST /api/admin/service-api-keys/resend/test sends real test email and detects if key is test vs production by catching 'testing' in error message. (3) Frontend AdminSettings.jsx had missing 'user' destructure from useAuth() - fixed by adding 'user' to destructure. Test Email Configuration section now shows success/failure with key type.

tested_features.backend_shutdown_no_nameerror: PASS - Server restarts cleanly without 'NameError: name client is not defined'
tested_features.mongo_client_import: PASS - _client imported as mongo_client from database.py at line 118
tested_features.shutdown_handler_uses_mongo_client: PASS - Line 17554 uses mongo_client.close() instead of undefined 'client'
tested_features.resend_test_email_endpoint: PASS - POST /api/admin/service-api-keys/resend/test sends email and returns {success: true, key_type: 'production'}
tested_features.resend_test_email_detects_key_type: PASS - Returns key_type: 'production' for working key, 'test (restricted)' for test key with fix_instructions
tested_features.frontend_test_email_section: PASS - 'Test Email Configuration' section visible in Admin Settings > API Keys tab
tested_features.frontend_send_test_email_button: PASS - Button with data-testid='test-resend-email-btn' works and shows result

fixes_applied.frontend_user_destructure: Added 'user' to useAuth() destructure in AdminSettings.jsx line 22 - was causing 'Failed to send test email' because user?.email was undefined
